title: Cruise Ship Heads to Spain Amid Hantavirus Outbreak
subtitle: International health authorities coordinate evacuations as concern grows over a rare virus on the MV Hondius.

summary.en: A cruise ship named the MV Hondius is traveling to the Canary Islands following an outbreak of hantavirus. Three people have died, and several others have been hospitalized due to the infection. Health officials from multiple countries are working together to bring passengers home safely. While the virus is typically spread by rodents, there is concern about rare cases of human-to-human transmission. Experts emphasize that the risk to the general public remains very low.
summary.zh: 一艘名為「宏迪斯號」的郵輪在爆發漢他病毒疫情後，正航向加那利群島。目前已有三人死亡，另有多人因感染住院。多國衛生官員正攜手合作，協助乘客安全返家。雖然此病毒通常透過齧齒類動物傳播，但對於極少數的人傳人案例仍存有疑慮。專家強調，一般大眾面臨的風險仍然極低。

paragraphs.en: A cruise ship is currently traveling toward the Canary Islands in Spain as part of an international effort to manage a hantavirus outbreak. The ship, known as the MV Hondius, carries more than 140 passengers and crew members. According to STAT News, Spanish authorities are preparing to receive the vessel on Sunday and have set up a special, isolated area to manage the arrival and ensure the safety of everyone on board.
paragraphs.zh: 一艘郵輪目前正航向西班牙的加那利群島，這是國際間為控制漢他病毒疫情所採取的行動之一。這艘名為「宏迪斯號 (MV Hondius)」的郵輪上載有超過一百四十名乘客與船員。根據 STAT 新聞報導，西班牙當局正準備於週日迎接該船，並已設立了一處特殊的隔離區，以處理船隻抵達事宜並確保船上所有人的安全。

paragraphs.en: Health officials report that the situation involves the Andes virus, which is a type of hantavirus. While hantavirus is usually spread through contact with rodent waste, this specific type can sometimes spread between people in rare cases. According to The Guardian World, there are currently five confirmed cases and three suspected cases. Tragically, three people have died since the outbreak began. Although some patients were treated in intensive care, officials noted on Thursday that those individuals are showing signs of improvement.
paragraphs.zh: 衛生官員指出，此次疫情涉及的是漢他病毒的一種，即安地斯病毒。雖然漢他病毒通常是透過接觸齧齒類動物的排泄物傳播，但這種特定病毒在極少數情況下，有時會發生人傳人的現象。根據衛報國際版報導，目前已有五起確診病例與三起疑似病例。令人遺憾的是，自疫情爆發以來已有三人死亡。儘管部分病患曾接受加護病房治療，但官員於週四表示，這些人的病情已出現好轉跡象。

paragraphs.en: The international response is complex because many passengers left the ship before the outbreak was officially identified. STAT News reports that health authorities across four continents are working to track down more than two dozen people who disembarked the ship in late April. In one instance, a flight attendant who had contact with a passenger from the ship became ill. However, she later tested negative for the virus, which helped ease concerns about the virus spreading easily. Christian Lindmeier, a spokesperson for the World Health Organization, stated that the risk to the public remains very low, noting that this situation is not like COVID-19.
paragraphs.zh: 由於許多乘客在疫情正式確認前就已離船，使得國際間的應對工作變得相當複雜。STAT 新聞報導指出，橫跨四大洲的衛生當局正致力於追蹤二十多名於四月下旬下船的乘客。其中一個案例是一名曾與船上乘客接觸的空服員出現不適，但她隨後的病毒檢測結果為陰性，這緩解了外界對於病毒容易擴散的擔憂。世界衛生組織發言人林德梅爾 (Christian Lindmeier) 表示，大眾面臨的風險仍然極低，並強調此情況與新冠肺炎疫情不同。

paragraphs.en: Governments are now moving quickly to bring their citizens home. The US State Department is organizing a flight to bring 17 American passengers back to the United States. According to The Guardian World, these passengers will be placed into quarantine in Nebraska upon their return. Nebraska is home to specialized medical facilities, including the National Quarantine Unit, which are prepared to provide care while protecting the public. The US government is working closely with the Spanish government and other health agencies to manage this process.
paragraphs.zh: 各國政府正迅速採取行動，將國民接回國。美國國務院正安排一架專機，將十七名美國籍乘客接回美國。根據衛報國際版報導，這些乘客返國後將被送往內布拉斯加州進行隔離。內布拉斯加州設有包括國家隔離單位在內的專業醫療設施，已做好準備在保護大眾的同時提供醫療照護。美國政府正與西班牙政府及其他衛生機構密切合作，以處理此一程序。

paragraphs.en: Spain is also under pressure to complete these evacuations quickly. Deutsche Welle (DW) Top reports that the Spanish government plans to have planes ready as soon as the ship arrives. Officials mentioned that weather conditions in the Canary Islands are a major factor. A regional spokesperson explained that there is a small window of time on Sunday to move passengers safely. If they miss this opportunity due to changing weather, the ship might be forced to leave the area, which would make the evacuation much more difficult.
paragraphs.zh: 西班牙政府也面臨必須儘速完成撤離工作的壓力。德國之聲 (DW) 報導指出，西班牙政府計畫在船隻抵達時立即備妥飛機。官員提到，加那利群島的天氣狀況是一項關鍵因素。一位區域發言人解釋，週日僅有短暫的空檔可以安全地轉移乘客。若因天氣變化錯失良機，郵輪可能被迫離開該海域，這將使撤離工作變得更加困難。

paragraphs.en: Where the virus originated remains a mystery. According to Deutsche Welle (DW) Top, Argentine health officials have stated it is highly unlikely that passengers were infected while the ship was in Argentina. Investigators are looking into the possibility that a Dutch couple may have been exposed to the virus during a bird-watching trip before they even boarded the cruise ship. The ship had previously stopped in remote locations, including Tristan da Cunha, a British overseas territory, where one additional suspected case was identified.
paragraphs.zh: 病毒的源頭目前仍是個謎。根據德國之聲報導，阿根廷衛生官員表示，乘客在郵輪停靠阿根廷期間感染病毒的可能性極低。調查人員正深入研究另一種可能性，即一對荷蘭籍夫婦在登船前，可能於一趟賞鳥行程中接觸到病毒。該郵輪先前曾停靠過偏遠地區，包括英國海外領地崔斯坦達庫尼亞群島，當地也發現了另一名疑似病例。

paragraphs.en: As the ship nears the Canary Islands, health departments in various countries continue to monitor the situation. For example, the New Jersey department of health is watching two residents who may have had contact with a person from the ship. These individuals do not have symptoms, but they are being monitored as a precaution. Health authorities stress that the risk to the general public is very low, as the virus does not spread easily between people. The focus remains on safely evacuating the passengers and providing necessary medical support to those who need it.
paragraphs.zh: 隨著郵輪逐漸靠近加那利群島，各國衛生部門持續監控疫情發展。例如，紐澤西州衛生部門正密切觀察兩名可能曾與船上人員接觸的居民。這些人目前並無症狀，但基於預防措施仍持續接受監控。衛生當局強調，由於該病毒不易在人與人之間傳播，對一般大眾的風險極低。目前的重點仍是安全撤離乘客，並為有需要的人提供必要的醫療支援。

keyTerms.definitionEn: To find someone or something after searching for a long time.
keyTerms.noteZh: 常見動詞 track（追蹤）加上 down，這裡指費力搜尋並找到特定的人。文中：STAT News reports that health authorities across four continents are working to track down more than two dozen people who disembarked the ship in late April.

keyTerms.definitionEn: A short period of time when something can be done.
keyTerms.noteZh: 常見作名詞（窗戶），這裡比喻為「一段可以做事的短暫時間」。文中：A regional spokesperson explained that there is a small window of time on Sunday to move passengers safely.

keyTerms.definitionEn: To watch and check a situation carefully over a period of time.
keyTerms.noteZh: 常見作名詞（螢幕/顯示器），這裡作動詞，指持續觀察健康狀況。文中：For example, the New Jersey department of health is watching two residents who may have had contact with a person from the ship.

sources.name: The Guardian World
sources.title: Americans on hantavirus cruise ship reportedly to be quarantined in US

sources.name: STAT News
sources.title: Spain readies for evacuations as a hantavirus-hit cruise ship heads for the Canary Islands

sources.name: Deutsche Welle (DW) Top
sources.title: Hantavirus: US plans evacuation flight for American cruise passengers

quiz.question: What is the primary concern regarding the arrival of the MV Hondius in the Canary Islands on Sunday?

options.A: The lack of medical facilities to treat the infected passengers.
options.B: The potential for unfavorable weather to disrupt the evacuation process.
options.C: The refusal of the Spanish government to allow the ship to dock.
options.D: The difficulty in tracking down passengers who already left the ship.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 B。根據文章第五段，西班牙政府面臨儘速撤離的壓力，且官員明確指出加那利群島的天氣狀況是關鍵因素。若因天氣變化錯過週日的撤離窗口，船隻可能被迫離開，導致撤離工作變得困難。選項 A 錯誤，因為西班牙已準備好專門的隔離區；選項 C 錯誤，因為西班牙正積極準備接收船隻；選項 D 雖然是文章提到的挑戰，但並非關於「週日抵達」時的主要擔憂。

quiz.question: Based on the information provided, why are health officials likely confident that the Andes virus will not cause a global pandemic similar to COVID-19?

options.A: Because the virus is only found in the Canary Islands.
options.B: Because the virus has already been completely contained on the ship.
options.C: Because the virus does not easily transmit from person to person.
options.D: Because all passengers who left the ship have already tested negative.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 C。根據文章第三段與第七段，世界衛生組織發言人明確指出此情況與 COVID-19 不同，且衛生當局強調此病毒不易在人與人之間傳播。雖然文章提到有零星感染案例，但其傳播模式與新冠病毒的廣泛傳染性有顯著差異。選項 A 錯誤，因為病毒源頭不明；選項 B 錯誤，因為仍有潛在接觸者在追蹤中；選項 D 錯誤，因為文章僅提到一名空服員測試為陰性，並非所有離船者皆已測試。

quiz.question: In the phrase 'the situation involves the Andes virus', what is the most accurate meaning of 'involves' in this context?

options.A: Requires as a necessary part or feature.
options.C: Relates to or concerns a specific subject.
options.D: Includes as a participant or member.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 C。在此語境下，「involves」意指「涉及」或「與...有關」，即說明該疫情的具體內容是關於安地斯病毒。選項 A 錯誤，因為病毒並非疫情的「必要組成部分」，而是疫情的「核心對象」；選項 B 錯誤，雖然疫情很複雜，但此處並非指被病毒搞亂；選項 D 錯誤，病毒不是疫情的「成員」，而是導致疫情的原因。

quiz.question: Which of the following best summarizes the main focus of the article?

options.A: The failure of international health agencies to prevent a hantavirus outbreak.
options.B: The scientific investigation into the origins of the Andes virus on the MV Hondius.
options.C: The logistical and health-related efforts to manage an outbreak on a cruise ship.
options.D: The political tension between Spain and the US regarding quarantine procedures.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 C。全文的核心在於報導 MV Hondius 號郵輪上發生的漢他病毒疫情，並詳細說明了各國政府如何協調撤離、醫療照護、追蹤接觸者以及應對物流挑戰。選項 A 過於主觀且非文章重點；選項 B 僅為文章的一小部分（第六段）；選項 D 錯誤，因為文中並未提及美西兩國有政治緊張關係，反而強調雙方密切合作。

aiDisclaimer: 本文由 AI 綜合多家報導生成，事實請以原始來源為準。
